summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: Calculus Connections & Applications
summary_sections.content_html:
Calculus Connections

Derivatives of Trig Functions

  • d/dx sin x = cos x
  • d/dx cos x = −sin x
  • d/dx tan x = sec²x

Limits Involving Trig

lim (sin x)/x = 1 as x → 0 (fundamental limit).

Integration

∫sin x dx = −cos x + C, ∫cos x dx = sin x + C. Trig identities simplify complex integrals.
